---
name: Translation Contribution
about: Submit or update a translation for PortPane. Any language is welcome — no programming experience required.
title: "[TRANSLATION] "
labels: translation, community
assignees: Computer-Tsu
---

## Language

**Language name:** (e.g. Spanish, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese)

**IETF language code:** (e.g. `es`, `ja`, `pt-BR`)
See [TRANSLATING.md](../../TRANSLATING.md) for a list of common codes.
Any language not on that list is still welcome — use the correct IETF tag.

---

## Translation Status

- [ ] New translation (this language is not yet in the repository)
- [ ] Update or correction to an existing translation
- [ ] Complete translation (all strings translated)
- [ ] Partial translation — describe coverage below:

**Coverage:** (e.g. "All main UI strings done, Settings/About not yet translated")

**Completeness estimate:** approximately ___% complete

---

## Tools Used

What did you use to help with the translation?

- [ ] Translated manually without assistance
- [ ] Used a translation tool (e.g. DeepL, Google Translate) and reviewed manually
- [ ] Native speaker
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## Terminology Notes

Any cultural or language-specific notes the maintainer should know.
For example:

- Preferred term for "COM port" in your language
- Preferred term for "Refresh" (some languages have formal/informal variants)
- Any strings where a literal translation doesn't make sense

---

## How to Contribute

See [TRANSLATING.md](../../TRANSLATING.md) for the full step-by-step guide.

The English source file to translate is:
`src/PortPane/Resources/Strings.resx`

Name your translation file: `Strings.{code}.resx` (e.g. `Strings.fr.resx`)

Attach your completed `.resx` file to this issue, or submit it as a pull request.

---

## CLA Acknowledgment

- [ ] I have read the [Contributor License Agreement](../../CLA.md) and agree to its terms
      (required before your contribution can be merged)
